notes:
### v1.1.10

#### Added
- Guardian Raid clears can now sync from LOA Logs encounters for known Guardian bosses.
- Temporary roster-wide event support was added for the Argeos Winter Event with 3 weekly completions and a 1-per-day limit.
- The dashboard now shows a Stoopid Argeos event label with open, done today, and fully done states.
- Non-gold earners can show tracked raid progress, and characters without tracked raids can show weekly fallback tasks.

#### Improved
- Dashboard card and list layouts were reworked with tighter spacing, centered roster grids, better list alignment, and reduced side padding.
- Chaos and Guardian status is visible again in card and list views, including lazy/resting states.
- Compact cards and wide list rows can show daily progress bars when space allows.
- Tracked weekly tasks now appear as compact icons with completion state and tooltips.
- Todo, Tracking, and Raid settings now use ordered roster buttons instead of dropdowns.
- The header countdown now switches to Next weekly reset in after Tuesday 10:00 UTC until Wednesday 10:00 UTC.
- Event and Paradise task icons were updated.

#### Fixed
- LOA Logs auto-start was temporarily disabled and replaced with reminder banners when LOA Logs is not running.
- The app now prevents duplicate running instances and reuses the existing tray/app instance.
- Roster-wide Chaos Gate and Field Boss tracking/completion are now scoped per roster with migration support.
- Argeos event toggles now update existing completion_status rows instead of creating duplicates.
- Event progress stays synced between Todo, Tracking, and Dashboard.

#### Changed
- Combat Power now renders with consistent decimal formatting to keep list rows aligned.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.1.10_x64-setup.exe` below.
